signal_evidence.consumer_stress_tier: We continue to see sort of pressure in the apparel space... lost some slight share in the performance apparel as we see guest behavior and trading down.
signal_evidence.pricing_power: We took a small amount of the assortment up modestly. We've been pleased with the price elasticity on those actions... no imminent plans to go further there.
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: I also want to acknowledge we have seen trends slow a bit since Thanksgiving, which we've taken into account in our Q4 guidance.
